title: MergeThread.java - Concurrent Merge Manager
description: The `MergeThread.java` file contains the `MergeThread` class, which is responsible for managing and executing merge operations concurrently during the reduce phase of Hadoop MapReduce. It extends the `Thread` class and overrides the `run` method to continuously wait for and execute merge tasks. The class maintains a queue of inputs to be merged and provides methods to start and wait for merge operations. The actual merging logic is implemented in the abstract `merge` method, which is intended to be overridden by subclasses. The class collaborates with other Hadoop components, importing necessary exceptions and utilizing Hadoop-specific logger and classification utilities.

raw_response:
TITLE: MergeThread.java - Concurrent Merge Manager

DESCRIPTION:
The `MergeThread.java` file contains the `MergeThread` class, which is responsible for managing and executing merge operations concurrently during the reduce phase of Hadoop MapReduce. It extends the `Thread` class and overrides the `run` method to continuously wait for and execute merge tasks. The class maintains a queue of inputs to be merged and provides methods to start and wait for merge operations. The actual merging logic is implemented in the abstract `merge` method, which is intended to be overridden by subclasses. The class collaborates with other Hadoop components, importing necessary exceptions and utilizing Hadoop-specific logger and classification utilities.
